description: Case-sensitive string comparison regression: PR removes .toLowerCase() on both the query and the target, breaking case-insensitive search semantics.

minimum_findings.notes: Pipeline must flag that the search became case-sensitive. The removed .toLowerCase() on both operands is the regression vector. Either reviewer lens (aligned or adversarial) should catch this; high-confidence promotion is expected when both do.

notes: Synthetic reproduction of Run 1 (2026-04-19, GP-1167) BLOCKING at app/api/fine-tuning/runs/route.ts:19. This is a baseline sanity-check fixture — any reasonably competent reviewer should catch it. If this fixture stops passing, the pipeline is fundamentally broken, not drifting at the margins.
